declared_goal: Analyze customer feedback to identify product improvement areas.
declared_plan: Collect customer feedback data from various sources
Preprocess feedback text to remove PII and special characters
Analyze feedback sentiment using a machine learning model
Identify top product features mentioned in negative reviews
Create a report summarizing improvement areas
Present findings to the product development team

trajectory.thought: Collecting customer feedback data from reviews and surveys.

args.query: SELECT * FROM customer_feedback WHERE source IN ('reviews', 'surveys')

Analyzing feedback sentiment using a machine learning model.
Identifying top product features mentioned in negative reviews.

trajectory.observation: Generated report on product improvement areas.
